title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Steel

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
